title: myroxylon flexuosum
intro: Myroxylon flexuosum, also known as the Palo Santo tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to Central and South America. Its medicinal properties include its essential oil, which has been used to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and pain relief. The health benefits of Myroxylon flexuosum include reducing inflammation, promoting relaxation, and possessing antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Palo Santo tree include essential oil, tinctures, and infused oils, which can be used in aromatherapy, massage, and skincare applications.
